messages.content: You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"set_smart_light_color","description":"Sets the color and brightness of smart lights in a specified room.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"room":{"type":"string"},"brightness":{"type":"string","enum":["bright","dim","off"]},"color":{"type":"string","enum":["warm","cool","daylight"]}},"required":["room","brightness","color"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"sync_lights_with_automation_system","description":"Syncs the smart lights with the home automation system for a specified room.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"room":{"type":"string"}},"required":["room"]}}}]</tools>
Set the living room lights to a warm dim glow and sync them with the automation system.
